mapper.sql: id, object_name, url, thumbnail_url, size_bytes, width, height, content_type, hash, uploader, uploader_id, uploader_username, uploader_display_name, exif_json, route_id, created_at, NULL AS vehicle_id

i.id, i.object_name, i.url, i.thumbnail_url, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height, i.content_type, i.hash, i.uploader, i.uploader_id, i.uploader_username, i.uploader_display_name, i.exif_json, i.route_id, i.created_at, NULL AS vehicle_id

i.id, i.object_name, i.url, i.thumbnail_url, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height, i.content_type, i.hash, i.uploader, i.uploader_id, i.uploader_username, i.uploader_display_name, i.exif_json, i.route_id, i.created_at, vi.vehicle_id AS vehicle_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM image i INNER JOIN vehicle_image vi ON vi.image_id = i.id WHERE vi.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY vi.sort_order ASC, i.id DESC
SELECT FROM image i ORDER BY i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM image i ORDER BY i.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image ( object_name, url, thumbnail_url, size_bytes, width, height, content_type, hash, uploader, uploader_id, uploader_username, uploader_display_name, exif_json, route_id ) VALUES ( #{objectName}, #{url}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{sizeBytes}, #{width}, #{height}, #{mimeType}, #{hash}, #{uploadUser}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderUsername}, #{uploaderDisplayName}, #{exifJson}, #{routeId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE image SET object_name = #{objectName}, url = #{url}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, content_type = #{mimeType}, hash = #{hash}, uploader = #{uploadUser}, uploader_id = #{uploaderId}, uploader_username = #{uploaderUsername}, uploader_display_name = #{uploaderDisplayName}, exif_json = #{exifJson}, route_id = #{routeId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM image i LEFT JOIN ( SELECT image_id, COALESCE( MAX(CASE WHEN is_cover = 1 THEN vehicle_id END), MAX(vehicle_id) ) AS vehicle_id FROM vehicle_image GROUP BY image_id ) vi ON vi.image_id = i.id WHERE i.uploader_id = #{uploaderId} ORDER BY i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.name AS city, COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) AS count, (SELECT i2.thumbnail_url FROM image i2 INNER JOIN vehicle_image vi2 ON vi2.image_id = i2.id INNER JOIN vehicle v2 ON v2.id = vi2.vehicle_id WHERE i2.uploader_id = #{uploaderId} AND v2.region_id = r.id ORDER BY i2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail FROM image i INNER JOIN vehicle_image vi ON vi.image_id = i.id INNER JOIN vehicle v ON v.id = vi.vehicle_id INNER JOIN region r ON r.id = v.region_id WHERE i.uploader_id = #{uploaderId} GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY count DESC
